parameters.text:
Hey there! I couldn't detect a job title in your message.

Here are a few ways to phrase it:
• *"find jobs for Product Manager"*
• *"UX Designer"*
• *"looking for senior backend engineer"*

Send a new message with your target role and I'll start searching! :mag:

messages.content: You are an expert resume writer specializing in ATS-optimized resumes. Rewrite the provided resume template to tailor it to the specific job posting. Preserve all factual information (work history, education, dates) but adjust phrasing, skill emphasis, and keyword density to match the job description. Output clean plain text only — no tables, no columns, no markdown. Use standard ATS section headers: SUMMARY, EXPERIENCE, SKILLS, EDUCATION. Be concise and professional.

You are a professional freelancer writing Upwork proposals. Write a concise, personalized cover letter (150-200 words). Open by addressing their specific problem, highlight 1-2 relevant skills with brief evidence, and end with a clear call to action. No generic openers like 'I am writing to apply'. Output plain text only.

={{ 'Job: ' + $('Merge Template Data').item.json.job_title + '
Client: ' + $('Merge Template Data').item.json.employer_name + '

Description:
' + $('Merge Template Data').item.json.job_description }}
